name: specialist-rewrite
title: Rewrite api-designer.md, database-architect.md, and test-engineer.md specialist templates to match the reasoning-focused format of harness-engineer.md. Each specialist gets: Domain Expertise, How This Specialist Reasons (5-8 patterns), Quality Criteria, Anti-Patterns, Context Requirements.
